ideas.title: Snake Chaos
ideas.concept: Multiplayer snake where eating power-ups changes physics — gravity flips, time slows, snakes merge

ideas.title: Tower Collapse
ideas.concept: Jenga-style physics puzzle where you must remove blocks without toppling a tower of sleeping animals

ideas.title: Word Dungeon
ideas.concept: Roguelike where your weapon stats are determined by the words you spell — longer/rarer words = more power

ideas.title: Color Flood
ideas.concept: Flood-fill puzzle — paint the board one color at a time, starting from the corner, beat it in limited moves

ideas.title: Idle Factory
ideas.concept: Idle clicker where you automate a toy factory — buy machines, hire robots, unlock production chains

ideas.title: Merge Valley
ideas.concept: Tap to merge two matching animals into the next evolution — 2 chicks → chicken → rooster → peacock — filling a farm board before it overflows
ideas.researchNote: Merge mechanic is #1 trending in 2025 hypercasual. Cute animals = strong thumbnail. Board overflow = natural urgency without timer.

ideas.title: Neon Blobs
ideas.concept: IO-lite solo game — you're a glowing blob, eat smaller blobs to grow, avoid bigger ones. Speed increases as you grow. Survive as long as possible
ideas.researchNote: IO games are CrazyGames' highest traffic category. Shell Shockers = most played. Solo IO-lite = zero multiplayer infra needed, same feel.

shipped.title: Gravity Flipper
shipped.concept: Endless runner where you flip gravity with one button

shipped.title: Pixel Chef Rush
shipped.concept: Overcooked-style cooking game with pixel art and absurd recipe combos

shipped.title: Stack Master
shipped.concept: A block swings left-right on a pendulum — tap to drop it onto the stack below. Overhang gets cut off. Stack 30 blocks perfectly for a bonus tower
shipped.notableFeatures: LittleJS engine (first game), ZzFX sounds (perfect timing), pendulum physics, streak system
